creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: It looks like the same underlying bug affects mdconfig.  Using 32-bit emulation "mdconfig -lv" returns nothing, even though there are md devices on the system.  Internally, mdconfig is using geom_gettree, so it's probably related to this bug.  To reproduce, run sbin/mdconfig/mdconfig_test:attach_malloc in a 32-bit chroot on an amd64 system.
